National Institute of Mental Health and.official_note: Official NIMHANS admissions page (admission notifications, prospectus, entrance/merit results for UG B.Sc courses incl. Neurophysiology Technology). Selection is on entrance-test merit; published lists are candidate roll-number merit lists for this single institute, not college/branch/category cutoff tables. Could not fetch via WebFetch (TLS certificate verification error on nimhans.ac.in); page confirmed to exist via search.

National Rail and Transportation Institu.official_note: Official Gati Shakti Vishwavidyalaya (formerly NRTI), Vadodara admission-notification page (loads; lists 2026-27 admission brochure/notifications and B.Tech programs). B.Tech admission is via JEE Main + JoSAA/CSAB, so authoritative closing ranks live on josaa.nic.in; GSV does not publish its own rank-cutoff table here.

National Standard Examination.official_note: Official IAPT National Standard Examination (NSEP/NSEC/NSEB/NSEA/NSEJS) page; IAPT publishes results, Minimum Admissible Score (MAS) and state/national merit lists at iapt.org.in (e.g. state cut-off PDFs under /images/nse_*). already_has_data true, so extraction skipped.

North Eastern Indira Gandhi Regional Ins.official_note: Official NEIGRIHMS Examination Results page (loads; lists B.Sc Nursing entrance-exam result + PG merit lists). Admission/merit is NEET-UG-score based for this single institute; published output is a candidate merit/result list, not a college/branch/category cutoff table.

Odisha Diploma Entrance Test.official_note: Official SAMS Odisha (SCTEVT/DTET) diploma 'Academic Session Wise Cut-Off Marks (%)' page. Note: Odisha discontinued the written Diploma Entrance Test (DET) from 2016-17; diploma admission is now Class-10 merit based via skill.samsodisha.gov.in. The cutoff-marks and category-wise merit/allotment pages are ASP.NET postback pages that returned an application error / require an in-portal session, so data could not be extracted via WebFetch.

Odisha Polytechnic Entrance Examination.official_note: Same official SAMS Odisha diploma portal as Odisha DET; 'Academic Session Wise Cut-Off Marks (%) Diploma' page plus institute/category-wise merit (MeritlistFresh.aspx) and allotment (Dip_SeatAllotmentFresh.aspx) pages. Admission is merit-based (Class-10 marks). ASP.NET pages returned an error / need a portal session, so no rows extractable via WebFetch.

Online Facilitation System for Students.official_note: Official OFSS Bihar (BSEB) portal for Intermediate/Class-11 and graduation admissions; college/stream-wise selection (merit/cut-off) lists are published per round on the OFSS portal (ofssbihar.net/ofssbihar.in). already_has_data true, so extraction skipped.
